canonical_schema.description: Normalized ticker/symbol. Must be uppercase and non-empty.
Original source file path or source identifier.
COMMON_STOCK, ETF, FUND, ADR, PREFERRED, WARRANT, etc.
IN_SCOPE or OUT_OF_SCOPE for Scout Finance universe.
HIGH, MEDIUM or LOW confidence after classification.

source_groups.expected_use: Expand and refresh current US public-market universe.

target_exchanges: OTC candidates only if explicitly approved
source_groups.expected_use: Increase coverage after core US exchanges are stable.
Move toward global universe once US expansion is reproducible.

deduplication_rules: Primary key must be exchange + ticker, not ticker alone.
Ticker collisions across exchanges must be preserved as separate instruments.
Exact duplicate exchange+ticker rows must be collapsed.
If duplicate rows have conflicting company names, keep the longest non-empty name and flag warning.
If duplicate rows have conflicting country/exchange values, flag blocker for that source.
Never merge different instrument types under one ticker without explicit classification.
exclusion_rules: Exclude obvious test rows, placeholders and malformed symbols.
Exclude warrants, rights, units and preferred shares from IN_SCOPE unless explicitly approved.
Classify ETFs/funds separately; do not mix with common-stock scouting unless approved.
ADR treatment must be explicit: either IN_SCOPE_ADR or OUT_OF_SCOPE_ADR.
Rows with low classification confidence must be reviewable before full dry-run.

validation_gates.name: Source Provider Inventory
validation_gates.goal: Create a machine-readable inventory of target source providers/exchanges.
validation_gates.unlock_condition: Providers listed with expected schema and acquisition method.

validation_gates.name: Expanded Source Builder Skeleton
validation_gates.goal: Create a no-network skeleton that combines local provider files if present.
validation_gates.unlock_condition: Builder can run safely without downloads and without scoring.

validation_gates.name: Expanded Source Validation
validation_gates.goal: Validate the expanded source using canonical schema and row thresholds.
validation_gates.unlock_condition: At least 15000 rows for first expansion, later 50000+ rows for full gate.

validation_gates.name: Repeat Source Validation
validation_gates.goal: Run v2.2C against the expanded source.
validation_gates.unlock_condition: Ticker mapping, duplicates and blockers clean.

validation_gates.name: Repeat Full Dry Run Gate
validation_gates.goal: Run v2.2E again after expanded source exists.
validation_gates.unlock_condition: Source rows >= 50000 and safety controls clean.

positives: v2.3B confirms that an expanded source is required.
recommendation: Proceed to v2.3D Source Provider Inventory. Do not download data yet.
